input.code:
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Load counts and metadata
counts <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names=1, check.names=FALSE)

# Ensure counts are integers
counts <- as.matrix(counts)
counts <- apply(counts, 2, as.integer)

# Verify dimensions
cat(sprintf("Counts: %d genes × %d cells\n", nrow(counts), ncol(counts)))
cat(sprintf("Metadata: %d samples\n", nrow(metadata)))
cat("\nCell type distribution:\n")
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts,
                               colData = metadata,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

cat("\nDESeqDataSet created\n")
cat(sprintf("Pre-filter: %d genes\n", nrow(dds)))
